shakshi: The player brought everything accumulated since 0001 to Bombastus — the weight of it too substantial for even Kelly to manage
Kelly judged the moment had arrived and let the information through unmanaged — the first time in the game
For the first time in the game Bombastus received complete information — the player may not register how unprecedented this is
Saffron removed from the priesthood — the manufactured reality that sustained the war's justification falls with official weight
The propaganda that began in 0004 falls officially — Bombastus's voice behind the collapse rather than just the player's broadcast
The structure Saffron held is now open — who fills it is the question 0057 answers
Kelly let something through unmanaged — the player may understand now that Kelly has been managing toward this moment the whole time
